sectionsModified: Deleting a page with child pages
changesSummary: Attempt 2 — fixed INV-style-132 rejection from attempt 1. Changed 'you must have' to 'you need to have' on line 71 in the 'Deleting a page with child pages' section. No other changes — accuracy and persona reviewers approved all other content in attempt 1.
